Trump Media aims for $3B raise to acquire crypto assets, potentially mirroring Strategy’s Bitcoin playbook
articles.description: Trump Media and Technology Group (TMTG), which runs Truth Social, is seeking to raise $3 billion for crypto asset acquisitions, the Financial Times reported Monday, citing six sources familiar with the plan. The company targets $2 billion in fresh equity and an additional $1 billion through convertible bonds, sources told the FT. articles.description: TL;DR Vitalik Buterin claims that decentralized networks like Ethereum could replace cash in emergency situations, as long as they are private and resilient enough. Vitalik Buterin: Ethereum Needs Privacy and Strength to Replace Cash
articles.description: Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has emphasized that maintaining resilience and privacy is essential for Ethereum to remain competitive against cash, especially as Nordic countries increasingly revert to cash usage.
